raw_text:
{
  "changed_files": [
    "index.html",
    "styles.css"
  ],
  "summary": [
    "Added `tabindex=\"-1\"` to the existing `#main-content` element so the skip link can move keyboard focus to the main region.",
    "Added a visible focus outline for the `main` target to make skip-link landing state clear without changing layout or copy."
  ],
  "verification": [
    "`rg -n \"skip-link|main-content|main:focus-visible|<main\" index.html styles.css`",
    "`Get-Content -Path index.html | Select-String -Pattern '<main id=\"main-content\" tabindex=\"-1\">' -Context 0,0`",
    "`Get-Content -Path styles.css | Select-String -Pattern '^main:focus-visible \\{$' -Context 0,3`"
  ],
  "open_issues": [],
  "risks": [],
  "next_step": "Browser-side reviewer can confirm keyboard behavior: first Tab reaches the skip link, and activating it visibly focuses the main content."
}

summary: Added `tabindex="-1"` to the existing `#main-content` element so the skip link can move keyboard focus to the main region.
Added a visible focus outline for the `main` target to make skip-link landing state clear without changing layout or copy.
parsed.next_step: Browser-side reviewer can confirm keyboard behavior: first Tab reaches the skip link, and activating it visibly focuses the main content.
